name: Riley Moore
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $103,130 for Riley Moore in U.S. House, WV-02. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
